name: Brassica Juncea
summary: Minimum source-backed intake for Brassica juncea.
description: Minimum source-backed intake for Brassica juncea. Active compound support includes sulforaphane under current workbook standards.
contraindications: anticoagulant medication such as warfarin because high vitamin K content may antagonize its blood-thinning effect
known allergy to the Brassicaceae family such as cabbage or canola or turnip because cross-reactive proteins have caused documented allergic reactions including anaphylaxis
hypothyroidism or iodine deficiency because heavy or concentrated intake of glucosinolates may impair thyroid hormone synthesis
